scripts.dev:local: concurrently -n web,api -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @foyer/web" "npm run dev:local -w @foyer/api"
scripts.dev:cloud: concurrently -n web,api -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @foyer/web" "npm run dev:cloud -w @foyer/api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @foyer/types && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
